reviews.comment:
Me embola el procedimiento de hacer una fila larguísima para cargar combustible. Los playeros muy lentos.

(Translated by Google)
I hate having to wait in such a long line to get fuel. The gas station attendants are so slow.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The waiting lines for service could be improved simply by adding a few more pumps.
